validation (1)

Pre-specified Tests

Hypothesis tests where the null, method, and significance threshold were committed before results were seen. Outputs are frozen after first execution — re-run a single analysis with make stats-<target>, then make stats to rebuild the site.

Analysis Makefile target
Alpha diversity (Kruskal–Wallis) make stats-diversity
Beta diversity (PERMANOVA × taxonomic level) make stats-permanova
Symptoms × fungal composition (Spearman + PERMANOVA) make stats-symptoms
Nutrients × diversity by disease group (Spearman) make stats-nutrients
Diet + mycobiome PCA / clustering make stats-pca
Evidence-ranking matrix (validation priority) make stats-evidence

Mycobiome-Diet Relationship Exploration

mycobiome
diet
pre-specified

Statistical figures covering relationships between key dietary and mycobiome markers.

Jun 9, 2026

PCA and clustering on combined diet and mycobiome profiles

pre-specified
pca
clustering
diet
genus

Participant-level PCA of scaled nutrient intake and genus relative abundance, with hierarchical clustering to explore diet–mycobiome groupings.

May 29, 2026

Evidence-ranking matrix for disease-group findings

pre-specified
synthesis
validation

Ranks the strongest diet, mycobiome, and symptom differences across Study_group_new to prioritize candidates for future validation.

May 29, 2026

Nutrients vs fungal diversity by disease group (Spearman)

pre-specified
alpha-diversity
diet
nutrients

Spearman correlations between dietary nutrients and alpha diversity, overall and stratified by study group (Active IBD, Quiescent, Non-IBD).

May 29, 2026

Symptom scores vs fungal composition (Spearman and PERMANOVA)

pre-specified
alpha-diversity
beta-diversity
genus
symptoms

Survey symptom scores (HBI and related items) tested against alpha diversity (Spearman) and genus beta diversity (PERMANOVA on Bray–Curtis).

May 22, 2026

Kruskal–Wallis alpha diversity by study group and fibre restriction

alpha-diversity
pre-specified

Non-parametric comparison of Shannon, richness, and other alpha metrics across study group and fibre-restriction levels.

May 19, 2026

PERMANOVA family beta diversity by study group

permanova
beta-diversity
family
pre-specified

Bray–Curtis dissimilarity on family relative abundance; study-group effect tested with permutational MANOVA.

May 19, 2026

permanova
beta-diversity
genus
pre-specified

Bray–Curtis dissimilarity on genus relative abundance; study-group effect tested with permutational MANOVA.

permanova
beta-diversity
phylum
pre-specified

Bray–Curtis dissimilarity on phylum relative abundance; study-group effect tested with permutational MANOVA.

Bray–Curtis dissimilarity on species relative abundance; group effect tested with permutational MANOVA.
